headline: Would You Work For Elon Musk At Twitter? 69% Of Benzinga Followers Say This
summary: Since taking over social media platform Twitter, job cuts and working for Elon Musk have been popular topics. Benzinga polled its Twitter followers to find out how people feel about working for Musk.

headline: This Congresswoman Has A Net Worth Of $21M, She Just Bought These 2 Dividend Paying Energy Stocks
Jim Simons 'The Man Who Solved The Market' Sold 3 Healthcare Dividend Payers, But Upped Stake In This One By 153%
summary: Jim Simons is the founder and hedge fund manager of Renaissance Technologies, which currently has a total portfolio value north of $77 billion, per Stock Circle. This hedge fund uses a quantitative strategy in determining its stock trades.

headline: Elon Musk Tweeted: The people have spoken.   Trump will be reinstated.
